zh.lifeSummary: 當Margareta Higgins於1458年出生在英國斯塔福爾斯特頓時，她的父親Sir Richard Wainwright Higgins26歲，母親Sarah Wilde22歲。她於1479年與Richard Barnes Mason在英國英格蘭史洛普爾結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和6個女兒的父母。她去世於1504年在英國爾阿爾德利享年46歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Margareta Higgins于1458年出生在英国斯塔福爾斯特頓时，她的父亲Sir Richard Wainwright Higgins26岁，母亲Sarah Wilde22岁。她于1479年与Richard Barnes Mason在英国英格兰史洛普爾结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和6个女儿的父母。她去世于1504年在英国爾阿爾德利享年46岁。

nameMeanings.name: Higgins
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Irish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó hUiginn ‘descendant of Uiginn’, a byname meaning ‘viking, sea-rover’ (from Old Norse víkingr). Compare McGuigan .

English (Lancashire and Yorkshire): variant of Higgin, itself either a Lancashire variant of Huggin (from a pet form of Hugh ), or a variant of Hickin (from a pet form of Richard ), with genitival or post-medieval excrescent -s. See Hick and compare Higson .

variants.name: McGuigan
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Brendan, Liam, Mairead.
Irish (northern): perhaps an Anglicized form of Gaelic Mag Uiginn ‘son of the viking’ (see Higgins 1).
Irish (northern): Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Guagáin, a shortened form of Mag Eochagáin, son of Eochagán, a diminutive of Eochaidh ‘horseman’. Compare Geoghegan .

variants.name: Kiggins
meanings: Irish (Galway and Mayo) and Manx: shortened Anglicized form (with English excrescent -s) of Gaelic Mag Uiginn ‘son of the Viking’ (see Higgins ).

nameMeanings.name: Margareta
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From the Latin form of Greek Margarītēs. See Margaret .

variants.name: Margaret
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

variants.name: Margrethe
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

en.lifeSummary: When Margareta Higgins was born in 1458, in Stretton, Staffordshire, England, her father, Sir Richard Wainwright Higgins, was 26 and her mother, Sarah Wilde, was 22. She married Richard Barnes Mason in 1479, in Shropshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 6 daughters. She died in 1504, in Alderley, Cheshire, England, at the age of 46.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Margareta Higgins est née en 1458, à Stretton, Staffordshire, Angleterre, son père, Sir Richard Wainwright Higgins, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Sarah Wilde, avait 22 ans. Elle a épousé Richard Barnes Mason en 1479, à Shropshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 6 filles. Elle est décédée en 1504, à Alderley, Cheshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 46 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Margareta Higgins 1458 in Stretton, Staffordshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir Richard Wainwright Higgins 26 und ihre Mutter Sarah Wilde 22. Sie hat 1479 in Shropshire, England, United Kingdom Richard Barnes Mason geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 6 Töchter. Sie starb 1504 im Alter von 46 Jahren in Alderley, Cheshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Margareta Higginsが1458年にイギリススタフォードシュアイアストレットオンで生まれた時，父Sir Richard Wainwright Higginsは26歳，母Sarah Wildeは22歳であった。1479年にイギリスイギリスシュロプシュアイアでRichard Barnes Masonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と6人の娘の親であった。彼女は1504年にイギリスチェシュアイアアルダーリーで46歳で死去した。

ko.Stretton by Burton upon Trent, Staffords: 영국 잉글랜드 스태퍼드실르 스트레턴 비 버턴 업 트렌트
ko.lifeSummary: Margareta Higgins(이)가 1458년 영국 스태퍼드실르 스트레턴에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Richard Wainwright Higgins(은)는 26세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Sarah Wilde(은)는 22세였다. 그녀는 1479년 영국 잉글랜드 슈럽실르에서 Richard Barnes Mason(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 여섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1504년 영국 체실르 알델리에서 46세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.Stretton by Burton upon Trent, Staffords: стреттон би буртон упон трент, стаффордшир, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Margareta Higgins родилась в 1458 г. в местности стреттон, стаффордшир, Англия, её отцу по имени Sir Richard Wainwright Higgins было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Sarah Wilde, 22. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Richard Barnes Mason в 1479 г. в местности шропшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 6 дочерей. Она умерла в 1504 г. в местности алдирли, чешир, Англия в возрасте 46 лет.
